message:
fix(gateway): middleware security and reliability improvements

## Correlation Middleware
- correlation.ts: Store correlationId and requestId in Hono context
  via c.set() for easy access in route handlers without AsyncLocalStorage

## Redaction Security Fix
- redaction.ts: Return REDACTED instead of raw object when depth limit
  exceeded (prevents accidental sensitive data exposure on deep objects)
- redaction.ts: Add isPlainObject() check to skip class instances and
  special objects that shouldn't be iterated with Object.entries()

## Database Connection Reliability
- connection.ts: Create parent directory for database file if it doesn't
  exist (handles first-run scenarios)
- connection.ts: Skip directory creation for :memory: databases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
